2605.01401.title: AI Expert Twin: Capturing Expert Cognition for Human-Centred, Practice-Based Learning
2605.01401.paper_summary: Tacit knowledge embedded in expert practice remains difficult to capture, formalise, and scale. While AI-driven educational systems have advanced personalisation, learner modelling, affective support, and self-regulated learning, they less often model the tacit reasoning and context-sensitive judgement that underpin expert practice in practice-based domains. This paper introduces the AI Expert Twin, a cognition-centric framework that models expert knowledge as structured, computable representations of procedural actions, semantic concepts, and decision processes. The framework also considers how value-laden preferences, trade-offs, and uncertainty shape expert judgement in practice. We formalise expert cognition as a three-layer representation and capture knowledge from experts under this model, laying the groundwork for integration into AI-powered educational system. A case study in a cultural heritage workshop demonstrates the feasibility of the approach in a real-world setting. The framework is designed to be transferable across domains such as vocational education and creative industries. By embedding expert heuristics into AI while maintaining transparency and learner agency, the AI Expert Twin offers a novel path towards scalable, practice-based learning and invites further research on ethical, human-centred applications of AI in education.
2605.01401.paper_summary_zh: 隱含在專家實踐中的默會知識仍然難以捕捉、形式化和擴展。雖然基於人工智慧的教育系統在個性化、學習者建模、情感支持和自我調節學習方面取得了進展，但它們較少建模專業領域中專家實踐所依賴的默會推理和情境敏感判斷。本文介紹了AI專家雙胞胎，一個以認知為中心的框架，將專家知識建模為程序性行動、語義概念和決策過程的結構化、可計算表示。該框架還考慮了價值觀偏好、取捨和平衡不確定性如何塑造專家在實踐中的判斷。我們將專家認知形式化為三層表示，並在此模型下捕捉專家的知識，為整合進入基於AI的教育系統奠定基礎。在一個文化遺產工作坊的案例研究中，展示了該方法在現實世界環境中的可行性。該框架旨在跨越職業教育和創意產業等領域進行轉移。通過將專家啟發式嵌入AI，同時保持透明度和學習者主導權，AI專家雙胞胎提供了一條通向可擴展的基於實踐的學習的新途徑，並邀請對AI在教育中倫理和以人為本應用的進一步研究。
2605.01401.author: Annie Yuan et.al.
2605.01401.authors: Annie Yuan, Xiaohua Chen, Kalina Yacef, Judy Kay
